cifake.title: CIFAKE: Real and AI-Generated Synthetic Images
cifake.notes: 120k CIFAR-style images: 60k real CIFAR-10 and 60k Stable Diffusion generated.

ai_vs_real_2026.title: AI Generated vs Real Images Dataset
ai_vs_real_2026.notes: Recent, practical-size real-vs-AI image dataset found through Kaggle search.

chatgpt_gemini_deepfake_2026.title: Chatgpt/Gemini Realistic images for DeepfakeDetect
chatgpt_gemini_deepfake_2026.notes: Very recent Kaggle candidate validated on 2026-06-12. Download exposes new dataset/train/{fake,real} and new dataset/valid/{fake,real}; audit found 243 images, five exact duplicate groups within train/fake, one perceptual duplicate pair within valid/fake, and no exact or perceptual train/valid leakage.

ishu_ai_vs_real_2026.title: ai-vs-real-images
ishu_ai_vs_real_2026.notes: Validated on 2026-06-12. Single-folder binary layout with AI-images and Real-images, 567 total images across animals/buildings/food/human/interior/items/nature. Audit found one exact duplicate group and four perceptual near-duplicate pairs, all within AI food images.

rhythm_ai_vs_real_2026.title: AI vs Real Images Dataset
rhythm_ai_vs_real_2026.notes: Recent Kaggle real-vs-AI image dataset with high usability rating.

itszubi_ai_vs_real_2026.title: AI vs Real Images Classification Dataset
itszubi_ai_vs_real_2026.notes: Small, practical Kaggle candidate with good usability. File listing begins with topic folders such as animals/*.png, so inspect labels before using it as a binary real-vs-generated benchmark.

safemedia_ai_image_eval_2026.title: SafeMedia AI Image Evaluation Sample
safemedia_ai_image_eval_2026.notes: Recent prompt/target image evaluation sample with per-image metadata. It appears useful for generated-image qualitative probes, but it is not a ready binary real-vs-fake image-folder benchmark.

deepfake_faces_2026.title: Deepfake Detection Dataset 2026
deepfake_faces_2026.notes: Small recent face-focused Kaggle package; current download is a CSV, not an image-folder benchmark.

stylegan3_faces_2026.title: 10000 Real vs Fake Faces (StyleGAN3)
stylegan3_faces_2026.notes: Recent StyleGAN3 face dataset; larger but useful for generator-specific face evaluation.

ai_generated_vs_real_multigen.title: ai-generated-images-vs-real-images
ai_generated_vs_real_multigen.notes: Large multi-generator dataset reported to include Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, and DALL-E images.

ms_cocoai_2026.title: MS COCOAI / Defactify Image Dataset
ms_cocoai_2026.notes: 2026 research dataset with real/synthetic COCO-aligned images from SD3, SD2.1, SDXL, DALL-E 3, and MidJourney v6.

realhd_2026.title: RealHD
realhd_2026.notes: 2026 large-scale benchmark with state-of-the-art generated images; use project instructions if released data access is available.

genimage.title: GenImage: A Million-Scale Benchmark for Detecting AI-Generated Images
genimage.notes: Million-scale real/fake image pairs across ImageNet-style classes and multiple generators; useful for cross-generator stress tests.

wildfake.title: WildFake: Large-Scale Challenging AI-Generated Image Detection Dataset
wildfake.notes: Large wild-collected dataset spanning GANs, diffusion models, other generators, styles, and real-world use cases; download via the linked project.

chameleon_aide_2025.title: Chameleon / AIDE AI-Generated Image Detection Benchmark
chameleon_aide_2025.notes: ICLR 2025 challenge benchmark designed around highly realistic AI-generated images that many off-the-shelf detectors misclassify.

ntire_robust_aigen_2026.title: NTIRE 2026 Robust AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild
ntire_robust_aigen_2026.notes: CVPR/NTIRE 2026 challenge training set with real and generated images plus in-the-wild transformations; useful for robustness and unseen-generator testing.

project1_aigen_2026.title: Project1 AI-Generated Image Detection 2026
project1_aigen_2026.notes: Small 2026 HF candidate reported as 50/50 real-vs-generated with labeled train/val and withheld test labels. Dataset Viewer first-row loading currently fails with a class-label parsing error, so validate import manually before benchmarking.

openfake_2026.title: OpenFake
openfake_2026.notes: Very large HF benchmark candidate with core train/validation/test plus a Reddit in-the-wild test split. Dataset Viewer reports 2,493,222 rows with image, label, model, type, and release_date columns; sample this rather than downloading wholesale.

parvesh_ai_vs_real.title: AI-vs-Real
parvesh_ai_vs_real.notes: HF real-vs-AI candidate with one train split. Dataset Viewer reports 13,999 rows and parquet shards are available, making it a practical import target.

real_vs_ai_corpus.title: Real vs AI Corpus
real_vs_ai_corpus.notes: Very large HF corpus merged from multiple public sources. Dataset Viewer reports 12,336,207 rows with label_text/source_dataset/source_license metadata; use source-balanced streaming samples for evaluation.

scam_ai_gpt_image_2_2026.title: GPT-image-2 Public Outputs
scam_ai_gpt_image_2_2026.notes: Recent generated-only candidate reported as 10,217 GPT-image-2 outputs from public Twitter/X posts after the model's 2026-04-21 release. Dataset Viewer returned 401 Unauthorized on 2026-06-12, so treat it as gated/manual and pair with real images before binary scoring.

aigi_now_2025.title: AIGI-Now
aigi_now_2025.notes: HF repository for a 2025 AI-generated image detection generalization paper. Dataset Viewer returned 501 Not Implemented on 2026-06-12, so this remains a manual import candidate.
